scripts.build: node scripts/copy-mcp-artifact.mjs && node scripts/stage-mcpb.mjs && pnpm dlx @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 validate manifest.json
scripts.test: node scripts/check-mcp-artifact.mjs && node scripts/smoke-server.mjs && node scripts/stage-mcpb.mjs && pnpm dlx @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 validate manifest.json && pnpm dlx @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 pack out/staging out/parle-claude-desktop-extension.mcpb && rm -rf out/unpacked && pnpm dlx @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 unpack out/parle-claude-desktop-extension.mcpb out/unpacked && node scripts/inspect-pack.mjs out/unpacked && node scripts/secret-scan.mjs . out/staging out/unpacked
